mapper.update: update password_reset_token set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, token_hash = #{tokenHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expires_at = #{expiresAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, used = #{used,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, user_id, token_hash, expires_at, created_at, used from password_reset_token
